title: 有馬記念の後に・黒星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Chiyono O loses her duel with Mr. C.B.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But win or no win, Sakura Chiyono O isn't about
to back down. She enthusiastically declares she
will win their next race, and Mr. C.B. accepts her
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Symboli Rudolf and Maruzensky
watch over the pair of excited racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky sends a wink to her rival and raves
about how much more spectacular Sakura
Chiyono O will be one day.
